compiled_state.title: Create review-sample-files.sh — stratified 7-file sampler
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## TDD Requirement

No exemption needed — Task 2841-926a provides the RED tests. This is the GREEN implementation task.

## Files to Create

### plugins/dso/scripts/review-sample-files.sh (executable, chmod +x)

Mock injection:
- GIT_DIFF_MOCK env var → use as file list instead of git diff --name-only HEAD
- BINARY_MOCK_<basename>=1 → treat file as binary
- LINE_COUNT_MOCK_<basename>=N → use N as line count instead of git diff --stat

Production paths:
- File list: git diff --name-only HEAD
- Binary detection: git check-attr binary
- Line counts: git diff --stat HEAD

Exclusions: .test-index, binary files, generated files (vendor/, node_modules/, *_generated.*, *.pb.go)

Logic:
- Count eligible files after exclusions
- If eligible < 7: print 'INSUFFICIENT_FILES: N eligible files (minimum 7 required)' to stdout; exit 1
- Score each file by line count descending
- Select 7 files, capped at 2 per directory for spread (at most 2 files from same directory unless fewer than 7 directories available)
- Output 7 file paths (one per line) to stdout; exit 0

Path resolution: _PLUGIN_ROOT=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd) — no hardcoded paths

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 7 RED tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-review-sample-files.sh 2>&1 | grep -c PASS | grep -q '^7$' && echo PASS
- [ ] Lint passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/review-sample-files.sh && echo PASS
- [ ] Uses BASH_SOURCE/_PLUGIN_ROOT for path resolution
  Verify: grep -q 'BASH_SOURCE\|_PLUGIN_ROOT' plugins/dso/scripts/review-sample-files.sh && echo PASS
- [ ] No literal plugins/dso/ in non-comment lines
  Verify: ! grep -v '^#' plugins/dso/scripts/review-sample-files.sh | grep -q 'plugins/dso' && echo PASS

comments.body: AC amendment: Specify production-path algorithm in script. (a) File list: git diff --name-only HEAD (not --cached). (b) Binary detection: use git diff --numstat — lines with '-\t-\t<file>' are binary. (c) Generated file exclusion list: package-lock.json, yarn.lock, *.min.js, *.min.css, *_pb2.py, *.pb.go, *_generated.*, vendor/, node_modules/. (d) Add AC: test_sample_binary_via_numstat verifies binary detection works in non-mock mode with a real binary fixture.
comments.author: Test
